---
title: "Getting started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(contextR)
```

`contextR` uses `context()` as the primary S3 API.

```{r}
fit_lm <- lm(mpg ~ wt + hp, data = mtcars)
out_lm <- context(fit_lm, mode = "strict", analysis_context = "Fuel efficiency example")
out_lm
```

```{r}
tt <- t.test(mpg ~ am, data = mtcars)
out_tt <- context(tt, mode = "safe")
out_tt
```

Mock backend is default and does not require API keys.

```{r, eval = requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)}
p <- ggplot2::ggplot(mtcars, ggplot2::aes(wt, mpg, colour = factor(cyl))) +
  ggplot2::geom_point()

p2 <- ggcontext(p, analysis_context = "Fuel economy comparison")
p2
```
